name: House Park Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and discard any bad or half-cooked beans.
2. Fill a large pot with beans and water.
3. Add chili and garlic powders to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a rolling boil.
5. Continue boiling for 2 hours, adding additional boiling water as needed to prevent the beans from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
6. The beans should be tender when touched.
7. Reduce heat to low and add salt and sugar.
8. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Makes 8-10 servings.
